sections.paragraph:
pl. f. (from the root שָׂרַף).

(1) a burning of lime, Isa 33:12 (compare Gen 11:3).

(2) the burning of dead bodies, Jer 34:5 (compare 2Ch 16:14).

(3) מִשְׂרְפֹות מַיִם (“the flow of waters,” from the root שְׂרַף, Ithpe. to drop [but see Thes.]), [Misrephoth-maim], pr.n. of a town or region near Sidon, Jos 11:8 13:6 .
